title: [FIRRTL] ExpandWhens dominance error with multiple layerblocks and implication intrinsics

features.name: multiple layerblocks under when with implication intrinsic
features.description: Code should include multiple layerblock regions nested under a when statement where each layerblock defines and uses an implication intrinsic

features.name: assert inside layerblock using locally computed LTL value
features.description: Code should include an assertion statement inside a layerblock that consumes a value produced by an LTL implication intrinsic within the same layerblock

features.name: duplicate identical layerblock siblings under same parent
features.description: Code should include two sibling layerblock regions with the same layer binding under the same parent control-flow region
